Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The event log shows a process with activities OR MS QS AS IQC TST RT PK LB DP D Some variations IQC may be repeated multiple times and there is a loop between TST and RT

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we have a loop between TST and RT after TST if test fails you go to RT and then back to TST We could have loop TST RT meaning you do TST then if failed you do RT and then TST again

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: All cases start with OR then MS then QS So these are sequential and mandatory

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: In case 4 after AS they go directly to TST skipping IQC In other cases after AS they go to IQC So IQC is optional after AS

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: That suggests a loop between AS and IQC if we have a loop AS IQC that would mean after AS you can either exit to TST or do IQC and then AS again

Name: Validation - PE
Text: That matches case 1 and case 2 and case 5 Case 4 also fits as AS then exit directly to TST

Name: Validation - NE
Text: Case 3 does not fit because after the first IQC they should go to AS not to another IQC

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Thus the assembly quality phase can be modeled as outer loop AS B where B is itself a loop of IQC with a silent transition

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The assembly quality phase can be modeled as outer loop AS B where B equals loop IQC tau

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This model can generate case 4 by exiting after AS case 2 and case 1 by doing one IQC block then AS then exiting case 5 by repeating that structure twice and case 3 by letting the inner IQC loop execute twice before returning to AS

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: In case 2 labeling LB is skipped So LB is optional after PK So we need an XOR for LB either LB or silent after PK

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The overall structure could be OR MS QS then the assembly loop then the testing loop then PK then a choice for LB then DP then D

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Define inner loop as OperatorPOWL with LOOP and children IQC and tau Define assembly loop as OperatorPOWL with LOOP and children AS and inner loop Define test loop as OperatorPOWL with LOOP and children TST and RT Define labeling choice as OperatorPOWL with XOR and children LB and tau

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Define the root partial order with nodes OR MS QS assembly loop test loop PK labeling choice DP D Add edges OR to MS MS to QS QS to assembly loop assembly loop to test loop test loop to PK PK to labeling choice labeling choice to DP and DP to D

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Thus the model with outer loop AS inner loop where inner loop is IQC tau can generate all cases including case 3 exactly
